title: RemediationPlan
description: Schema for the LLM-generated remediation plan. Validated by plan_parser.py before any action is taken.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the plan was generated

diagnosis.description: LLM's natural language summary of the detected issue

confidence.description: LLM confidence score for the diagnosis (0.0 - 1.0)

action_id.description: Unique ID for this action within the plan

action_type.description: Logical action type mapped to OS commands in actions_map.py

description.description: Human-readable explanation of what this action does and why

params.description: Optional parameters for the action (e.g. interface name, DNS server IP)

requires_rollback.description: Whether a snapshot should be taken before executing this action

fallback_plan.description: LLM suggestion if all actions fail — shown to user after rollback
